## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **Device:** (laptop, phone, Raspberry Pi, etc.)
- **OS:** (Windows, macOS, Linux distro, Android)
- **Browser:** (Chrome, Firefox, etc.)
- **CivOS Version:** (from the header bar)

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.
